news.headline: Pollo AI introduces Consistent Character Video feature to ensure consistency in AI-generated videos. AI video generation enhanced.
news.summary: In Singapore on January 9, 2025, Pollo AI unveiled its newest innovation in AI video generation. The latest feature, Consistent Character Video, is designed to convert static images into premium AI videos. This cutting-edge technology ensures continuity of characters, objects, and more within the generated videos.

news.headline: GMO Internet Group creates GMO-Z.com TECH KR, Inc. in South Korea to boost affiliate marketing and payment services.
news.summary: A company from the GMO Internet Group has announced the launch of GMO-Z.com TECH KR, Inc. in Seoul, South Korea. The new entity aims to capitalize on opportunities in affiliate marketing and payment services to increase its market presence in Korea. This move underscores the company's strategic focus on expanding its distribution channels in the region.

news.headline: Dogecoin dropped by 16% over a month but trader believes it will hit $1 in 2025 despite the recent dip.
news.summary: Despite recent setbacks, a well-known cryptocurrency trader reaffirmed their optimistic prediction for Dogecoin (DOGE) on Thursday. Trader Tardigrade, who is renowned for their skill in recognizing patterns and predicting price movements, confidently projected that the popular dog-themed cryptocurrency will eventually hit the $1 mark. Stressing that a significant surge often follows a retracement, the trader advised followers not to be overly concerned about the current correction. While Dogecoin reached a high of $0.46 in December 2024, it has experienced a decline of nearly 30% since then, with a 16% drop over the past month. Trader Tardigrade also outlined a price target of $2 in a separate analysis. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: HKEX appoints Gregory Yu as Managing Director and Head of Markets
Bank Alfalah acquires 9.9% stake in UAE fintech Jingle Pay, growing its presence in MENAP region. #FintechInvestment
news.summary: In Dubai, the United Arab Emirates, a major commercial bank in Pakistan, Bank Alfalah, recently disclosed its purchase of a 9.9% ownership share in Jingle Pay, a rapidly expanding fintech company in the Middle East, North Africa, and Pakistan region. With more than 1,000 branches under its network, Bank Alfalah's significant investment in the fintech industry showcases its commitment to innovation and growth.

news.headline: Sui's DeFi growth soars in Q4 2024, hitting $1.8B TVL, $44.3B volume. Sui Foundation reports.
news.summary: In the fourth quarter of 2024, the DeFi ecosystem of Sui experienced substantial expansion, achieving a peak Total Value Locked (TVL) of $1.8 billion and generating a total trading volume of $44.3 billion, as reported by the Sui Foundation. These numbers reflect the notable growth and activity within Sui's DeFi platform during that period.

news.headline: Crypto nearing 'Banana Singularity': Real Vision CEO predicts altcoin season where everything skyrockets before a significant consolidation.
news.summary: According to Real Vision CEO Raoul Pal, the forthcoming stage in the Banana Zone will showcase an altcoin season characterized by a general increase in value across various cryptocurrencies, followed by a more significant period of consolidation.

news.headline: Anta Kids held Spring Festival exhibition on Jan 5, 2025, themed "Intangible Cultural Heritage Inheritance, Innovating the Future".
news.summary: In Xiamen, China, on January 5, 2025, Anta Kids organized a Spring Festival exhibition titled "Intangible Cultural Heritage Inheritance, Innovating the Future" at WM House in Chengdu Taikoo Li. The event coincided with the New Year of the Snake, showcasing traditional cultural elements.

news.headline: Faraday Future will deliver FF 91 2.0 to Luke Hans on Jan 12, 2025, first delivery of 2025. Hans is a prominent entrepreneur and community leader in LA.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (NASDAQ: FFIE) revealed that Luke Hans, a well-known entrepreneur in the Chinese community, will receive the first FF 91 2.0 Futurist Alliance EV of 2025 on January 12. The delivery ceremony, in the presence of FF executives, will commemorate this milestone for the California-based global intelligent electric mobility ecosystem company.

news.headline: Taiwan's smart cockpit market evolving towards high customization. Report offers analysis of global trends & Taiwan's industry, focusing on display technologies, sensor modules, and ADAS systems. Important numbers: Report covers key suppliers and critical roles in enhancing cockpit technology.
news.summary: An extensive analysis of the smart cockpit development trends and Taiwan's industry landscape has been included in a recent report available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The report delves into global development trends of smart cockpit components, focusing on key technologies like display technologies, sensor modules, and ADAS systems. It also identifies prominent suppliers in the industry. This comprehensive report sheds light on the critical roles played by these components in enhancing cockpit functionalities.

news.headline: Term Structure Labs launches TermMax on Arbitrum and Ethereum testnet, offering leveraged yield strategies with fixed income debt products.
news.summary: In Hong Kong on January 9, 2025, the Term Structure Labs team introduced TermMax on the Arbitrum and Ethereum testnet. This DeFi protocol aims to streamline leveraged yield strategies by providing fixed income debt & earn products with built-in leverage features.

news.headline: CleanSpark now one of four Bitcoin miners holding 10,000 BTC, alongside MARA Holdings, Riot Platforms, and Hut 8 Mining Corp.
news.summary: CleanSpark has recently become one of the key Bitcoin mining companies alongside MARA Holdings, Riot Platforms, and Hut 8 Mining Corp. The firm now holds over 10,000 Bitcoins on its balance sheet.

news.headline: China replaces Zheng Wei as Deputy Chief of FX regulator
CFTC subpoenas Coinbase over Polymarket involvement, seeks customer info. Polymarket not allowed in U.S. Coinbase may share info.
news.summary: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission has sent a subpoena to Coinbase (NASDAQ:COIN) regarding its involvement with the prediction platform Polymarket. The CFTC is requesting "general customer information" related to Polymarket, an illegal forecasting platform based on Polygon (CRYPTO: POL) in the U.S. This was reported on Thursday. Angel investor and Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) advocate, Eric Conner, disclosed an email from Coinbase alerting users about the CFTC's request. Depending on legal developments in the next week, Coinbase may need to provide information to the CFTC. Sources indicate that Polymarket is not authorized to operate in the U.S. For the complete article, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: China replaces Deputy Housing Minister Wang Hui
Elon Musk celebrates as DOGE meme appears in Senate; Senator Ernst displays DOGE canvas, symbolizing increased adoption and price surge.
news.summary: Tech mogul Elon Musk, who will be leading the "Department of Government Efficiency," expressed delight over the appearance of a prominent DOGE meme at the U.S. Senate. Senator Joni Ernst, chair of the Senate DOGE Caucus, unveiled a canvas featuring DOGE taking over Washington, D.C. This particular meme variant has garnered a devoted following among supporters of Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE). Referred to as the "DOGE Storm," it symbolizes increasing adoption and price surges. Senator Ernst's creative gesture signals the meme's influence beyond the digital sphere.

This shift signifies a significant change in attitude towards digital assets and their potential as investment opportunities.

The unique functionalities of the Yukon make it particularly ideal for various settings.

news.headline: Stellus Capital Investment Corp changes dividend record date to $0.40 for 1st quarter 2025, paying $0.1333 monthly Feb, March, April.

news.headline: VanEck expert states Block Inc. may be the pioneer in S&P 500 with a focused Bitcoin strategy, unlike Tesla.
news.summary: Even though companies such as Tesla are currently part of the S&P 500, analyst Matthew Sigel of VanEck suggests that Block Inc. may become the inaugural company in the index to have a deliberate plan for amassing Bitcoin.

news.headline: Tesla's Model Y refreshed after deliveries drop in 2024; BYD leads in Q4 BEV sales. TSLA stock holds strong.
news.summary: In 2024, Tesla saw a decline in deliveries; however, the company introduced a revamped Model Y. Meanwhile, BYD experienced a significant increase in sales, overtaking the electric vehicle market in the fourth quarter. Despite these developments, Tesla's stock continues to perform well. This comes as BYD emerges as a strong competitor, leading to comparisons between the two companies in the electric vehicle sector. The recent launch of the new Model Y by Tesla coincided with BYD's rise to dominance in the battery electric vehicle sector. The developments underline the intensifying competition in the EV market as both companies strive for market leadership.

CES is known as the biggest technology trade fair globally, with this year's event shaping up to be groundbreaking.

news.headline: CEO of Christie's Intl Real Estate Sereno, Chris Trapani, named to 2025 Swanepoel Power 200. Recognizes influential leaders.
news.summary: In Los Gatos, California on January 9, 2025, Christie's International Real Estate Sereno revealed that their Co-Founder and CEO, Chris Trapani, has secured a spot on the 2025 Swanepoel Power 200 (SP 200) list. This recognition celebrates the top leaders in the North American real estate sector.

news.headline: Cryptocurrencies Bitcoin, Ethereum, Dogecoin slip ahead of job data. Bitcoin down 2.54% at $92,600. Market cautious.
news.summary: Leading cryptocurrencies including Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Dogecoin experienced losses on Thursday, with Bitcoin dropping by 2.54% to $92,600.34, Ethereum by 3.22% to $3,220.17, and Dogecoin by 5.10% to $0.3237 at 7:30 p.m. ET. Bitcoin hit an intraday low of $91,220 and has decreased by almost 10% from its recent highs of $102,000. The Justice Department's approval to sell $6.5 billion in Bitcoin and on-chain movements caused market panic, leading to liquidations of nearly $285 million in upside bets in the last 24 hours. Binance traders are optimistic about Bitcoin rebounding, with more than 68% betting on it. A return to $100,000 would liquidate about $780 million in short positions. The Crypto Fear & Greed Index shifted to "Neutral" from "Greed" as traders reduced their risks.

news.headline: PBOC halts buying government bonds temporarily in China, announces move.
news.summary: A recent report indicates a significant increase in global temperatures, with an increase of 1.05 degrees Celsius recorded compared to pre-industrial levels. The report also highlighted a worrying trend of rising sea levels, with an increase of 3.6 millimeters per year from 2006 to 2015. This data serves as a stark reminder of the urgent need for global action to combat climate change and its damaging effects on our planet.

Santa Rally boosts Wall Street: Stocks rise, Tesla up 7.35%, Bitcoin at $98,000. S&P 500 +1%, Nasdaq 100 +1.3%, Dow +0.9%.
news.summary: The Santa Rally season commenced on Wall Street with a positive start, as all major indices and sectors ended higher in a truncated session before the Christmas holiday. The S&P 500 saw a 1% increase, continuing its rise for a third consecutive session post the Federal Reserve meeting last week that saw heightened volatility. The Dow Jones Industrial Average went up by 0.9%, with the tech-heavy Nasdaq 100 also climbing by 1.3%, nearly recovering from the losses experienced the previous week. With light trading volumes, consumer discretionary stocks, the year's top-performing sector, led the rally. Tesla Inc (NASDAQ:TSLA) stood out with a remarkable surge of 7.35%, marking its most robust single-day performance since November. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: QuantumScape stock gained 17.59% last week but has lost over 43% since going public. Options market shows skepticism.
news.summary: The article highlights the potential benefits for QuantumScape in the growing electric vehicle industry. QuantumScape specializes in electric vehicle battery technology, and the expanding market suggests increased demand for their advanced batteries. The rise of energy-efficient power plants could also alleviate strain on grid infrastructures. Last week, QuantumScape stock surged by 17.59%, but since its market debut, it has lost over 43% of its value. The options market reflects skepticism, with institutional investors betting against QS stock. Despite recent gains, sustaining positive momentum remains uncertain. Investors need solid reasons to be optimistic about QuantumScape's future amidst the market trends.

news.headline: Comstock (AMEX:LODE) partners with Gresham’s Eastern in Pakistan to produce renewable fuels. Exclusive project rights granted.
news.summary: Comstock Inc. (LODE) stock is seeing an increase in premarket trading. The company recently announced a significant agreement between Comstock Fuels Corporation and Gresham’s Eastern (Pvt) Ltd in Pakistan. According to the terms, Comstock Fuels has agreed to provide exclusive project and site development rights to Gresham’s in Pakistan. This partnership allows Gresham’s to utilize Comstock Fuels’ patented biomass refining technologies to generate sustainable aviation fuel and other renewable fuels in Pakistan. Gresham will be responsible for managing the development, financing, construction, and overall execution of the project.

news.headline: Synaptics and Google join forces to enhance Edge AI for IoT, combining MLIR ML core with Astra hardware. Low-power computing platform for IoT.
news.summary: Synaptics Incorporated revealed a partnership with Google to enhance Edge AI for IoT by leveraging optimized multimodal processing. This collaboration integrates Google's ML core with Synaptics Astra hardware, allowing AI devices to handle various modalities. The Synaptics Astra AI-Native platform offers low-power Edge computing with open-source tools and wireless connectivity. This initiative is built upon Synaptics' renowned expertise in the field. Interested readers can find the complete article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Gary Smalley becomes CEO of Tutor Perini Corp effective Jan 1, 2025. Shares trade higher premarket. Ronald Tutor remains Executive Chairman.
news.summary: Shares of Tutor Perini Corporation (NYSE:TPC) are experiencing an increase in premarket trading on Thursday following the announcement that Gary Smalley will assume the role of Chief Executive Officer and join the company's Board of Directors starting on January 1, 2025. This follows Smalley's appointment as President back in November 2023, with intentions of him eventually taking over from Ronald Tutor.

news.headline: Dan Loeb's hedge fund Third Point managed $7 billion in assets; his top holding, PG&E, grew 17.12% in 2024.
news.summary: Renowned hedge fund manager Dan Loeb, founder of Third Point overseeing $7 billion in assets, is known for his assertive activist strategies in driving substantial changes within global companies. Heading into 2025, let's examine the performance of Loeb's leading stock holdings from June to December 2024. By November 2024, his key stakes comprised 49.7 million shares in Pacific Gas & Electric Co. (NYSE:PCG) and 11.8 million shares in Bath & Body Works, Inc. (NYSE:BBWI). During the latter half of 2024, PCG shares spiked by approximately 17.12%, outperforming the S&P 500 which grew by 5.65%. Noteworthy recent events include PCG reaffirming its 2024 adjusted EPS forecast at $1.34-$1.37, aligning with the $1.36 consensus, and its 2025 adjusted EPS projection of $1.47 to $1.51.

news.headline: US natural gas prices sharply drop to $3.39/MMBtu at Henry Hub, a 7% decrease, due to mild weather forecasts & a 116 Bcf inventory draw falling short of expectations.
news.summary: After experiencing notable increases, U.S. natural gas prices at the Henry Hub facility took a sharp downturn on Friday, plummeting by more than 7% to $3.39 per million British thermal units (MMBtu), marking the lowest point in the past week. This abrupt drop was primarily caused by forecasts of milder cold weather and a smaller-than-expected reduction in inventory, leading to diminished expectations for near-term demand and offsetting the previous positive trend.The most recent data on natural gas storage indicated a softer drawdown. According to the Energy Information Administration, natural gas supplies saw a reduction of 116 billion cubic feet (Bcf) during the week ending on Dec. 27. Although this decrease was higher than the previous week's 93 Bcf drop, it failed to meet analyst predictions of a 127 Bcf withdrawal. In comparison, the typical decline for this season is around 104 Bcf based on the five-year average.

news.headline: Wall Street rebounds after five-day slump, major indices up, US Steel tumbles. ISM Manufacturing PMI strong. Oil at $73.82/barrel.
news.summary: On Friday, Wall Street experienced a strong recovery, potentially breaking a five-day losing streak, the longest since April. The major indices all saw gains, with the Nasdaq 100 leading the way. Every sector in the S&P 500 also recorded positive movement, indicating widespread market strength. The ISM Manufacturing PMI for December surpassed expectations, suggesting a healthier manufacturing sector for the second month in a row. Treasury yields rose, with the 30-year yield reaching 4.80%. Richmond Fed President Thomas Barkin adopted a hawkish stance during his speech, emphasizing the importance of maintaining tight monetary policy to combat inflation risks. Crude oil prices rose over 1% to $73.82 per barrel, marking the sixth straight session of gains, while natural gas prices plummeted by nearly 8%.

news.headline: Top mid-cap gainers last week:1. Rigetti Computing, Inc. (NYSE: RGTI) saw a 23.19% increase.2. VEON Ltd. (NASDAQ: VEON) surged by 17.03%.Are these in your portfolio?
news.summary: Over the past week, eight mid-cap stocks emerged as top performers, showcasing potential for investors. Rigetti Computing, Inc. (NASDAQ:RGTI) experienced a significant 23.19% increase in share value, reflecting the surging interest in the quantum computing sector. Similarly, VEON Ltd. (NASDAQ:VEON) saw its stock soar by 17.03% after announcing a groundbreaking agreement between Kyivstar and Starlink for direct-to-cell services. These developments highlight the growth prospects of these stocks that may warrant consideration for inclusion in one's investment portfolio.
